query: SELECT matricula, marca, modelo, eurocode, obrano, nomeLoja, lojaId FROM eurocodes_fichas WHERE matricula LIKE '%BT%35%ZB%' OR matricula LIKE '%BT35ZB%' LIMIT 5;
